data.body: STACK PUSHED to Gerrit refs/for/main as relation chain, changes 598-606 (rebased onto current origin/main ae98c8f0f; zero conflicts). Folded drift-doc regenerations into causing commits: env-vars.md->44b7, cli-reference.md->5977 (each Gerrit patchset drift-clean). Pre-flight: lint+typecheck clean, drift gates pass, 143 touched-area tests pass. Full make test earlier: 5634 passed (the 2 drift failures now fixed; 3rd 'resolve_symbol yaml' is environmental=venv-in-worktree, passes on CI). Awaiting LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1 on each before closing tickets bottom-up + submitting. Mapping: 598=4001 599=44b7 600=1d1b 601=1fdc 602=f476 603=a263 604=5977 605=2da6 606=25aa.
